---
name: Documentation improvement
about: Typo, unclear step, or missing explanation
title: '[Docs] '
labels: documentation
assignees: ''
---

## What needs improving?

- [ ] Typo or grammar
- [ ] Unclear or missing step in a guide
- [ ] Missing explanation (e.g. "why do we do this?")
- [ ] Broken or outdated link
- [ ] Other (describe below)

## Where?

- **File or section**: (e.g. `docs/local/02-compose.md`, "Step 3")
- **Current text** (if applicable): paste the sentence or paragraph

## Suggested change

How it could read instead, or what to add. If it's a typo, just give the correction.

## Why it helps beginners

Optional: one sentence on why this change helps (e.g. "New users often get stuck here because …").
